pages.text: A symbiotic organism of the Wraith Ghoul, containing six times the protein of beef. As a dark mage who'll try biting almost anything, you shouldn't pass up such a rare delicacy.

pages.title: Rotten Corpse Maggot Feast
pages.text: Can be collected three times. Grants consumer Nourishment (10 minutes).$(br)$(4)25% chance to immediately summon a$(4)Wraith Ghoul upon consumption
